Rule.name: Ascension-Rule-Policy-SharePointOnlineGuestAccess-AP
Rule.Description: This Rule for identities should not have more than on role at same time, in violation of a policy that prohibits stale users.

Argument.name: log
Argument.Description: The log object associated with the SailPointContext.

Argument.name: context
Argument.Description: A sailpoint.api.SailPointContext object that can be used to query the database if necessary.

Rule.Source:
import sailpoint.rapidapponboarding.rule.PolicyViolationsRuleLibrary;
return PolicyViolationsRuleLibrary.isEligibleViolation(context, identity, "SharePoint Online Guest Access (not for Communities SharePoint)","Ineligible For SharePoint Online Guest Access", "Users with @ascension.org or @ascension-external.org email addresses are prohibited from requesting SharePoint Online Guest Access");
